name: Just Read It, Please
description:
You love her too, right? Right? Please say you do.

—

The song attached doesn’t match 1 to 1 with this character, however I find that—especially the end—fits the vibe quite nicely.

Btw her personality is the love letter.

I’ve also made a Discord recently, you can join here.

—

CW/TW

Obsessive behavior, unhealthy attachment, stalking themes, boundary violations, mental health depiction
